rule: Damage types should have one canonical registry and UI vocabulary.
currentEvidence: WeaponDataResolver, weapon-config-dialog, and old item sheet expose different damage type lists; Electrical is missing from main options and physical subtypes coexist with kinetic.

rule: Stun deals half HP damage to creatures and uses original pre-halved damage for Damage Threshold.
currentEvidence: DamageResolutionEngine receives one damage number and one damageType string; ThresholdEngine has an isStun branch but no clear HP/threshold split packet.

rule: Stun affects creatures and does no damage to non-creature targets unless another rule says otherwise.
currentEvidence: No reliable target category gate found in the core damage resolution path for Stun non-creature immunity.

rule: Ion applies half HP damage but compares original Ion damage to Damage Threshold.
currentEvidence: ThresholdEngine comment says caller must pass correct Ion damage; DamageResolutionEngine appears to use one damage number for mitigation, HP, and threshold.

rule: Ion special CT/disable effects apply to droids, vehicles, electronic devices, and cybernetic creatures, not ordinary living creatures.
currentEvidence: No reliable target category/cybernetic eligibility gate found in the core damage resolution path.

rule: Taking Fire damage causes the target to catch fire and creates a recurring Fire hazard until extinguished.
currentEvidence: RecurringDamageAdapter displays pending recurring damage but is display-only; no canonical Fire damage to Burning hazard creation path found.

rule: Acid contact should create a recurring hazard until washed off or treated.
currentEvidence: Acid exists as a damage type, but no canonical Acid hazard state/resolution path was found.

rule: Sonic damage is considered Energy damage in all ways.
currentEvidence: Sonic exists as a damage type but no clear canonical countsAs/alias registry was found for mitigation or reactions.

rule: Ranged Sonic weapons cannot be Deflected by lightsabers.
currentEvidence: ReactionRegistry.deflect has validDamageTypes null and no explicit Sonic exclusion found.

rule: Bonus Sonic damage may still apply even when the weapon's normal deflectable damage is deflected, if the attack would normally hit.
currentEvidence: Damage rolls currently build one formula and one damageType; no packet-level deflectable/non-deflectable damage parts were found.

rule: Yuuzhan Vong are immune to Force effects that target Will Defense.
currentEvidence: Yuuzhan Vong trait text exists, but no core damage/effect gate was found that combines Force source, Will target, and Yuuzhan Vong species immunity.

rule: Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing are distinct damage types, while the system heavily uses Kinetic as a broad bucket.
currentEvidence: Pack inventory found both kinetic and specific physical types such as bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing.

rule: Electrical is a distinct damage type in the supplied damage type table.
currentEvidence: Electrical/electricity was not present in the main weapon damage type option lists inspected.
